AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D LiDAR的SLAM环路闭合验证新算法CliReg，通过最大团搜索替代RANSAC方法提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有RANSAC方法在噪声、异常值及稀疏环境下易失效，导致地图不一致，需更可靠的环路闭合检测方案。
AI.method: 构建特征对应关系的兼容性图，通过确定性最大团搜索替代随机抽样RANSAC，结合二值3D描述子与汉明距离嵌入二叉搜索树匹配。
AI.result: 在多真实数据集测试中，CliReg在稀疏/模糊场景下较RANSAC降低位姿误差，2D投影地图实验验证其跨空间域通用性。
AI.conclusion: CliReg算法提供了一种鲁棒且高效的环路闭合检测替代方案，适用于复杂环境下的3D LiDAR SLAM系统。

title: Legal interpretation and AI: from expert systems to argumentation and LLMs
summary: AI and Law research has encountered legal interpretation in different ways, in the context of its evolving approaches and methodologies. Research on expert system has focused on legal knowledge engineering, with the goal of ensuring that human-generated interpretations can be precisely transferred into knowledge-bases, to be consistently applied. Research on argumentation has aimed at representing the structure of interpretive arguments, as well as their dialectical interactions, to assess of the acceptability of interpretive claims within argumentation frameworks. Research on machine learning has focused on the automated generation of interpretive suggestions and arguments, through general and specialised language models, now being increasingly deployed in legal practice.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能在法律解释领域的应用演变，从专家系统到论证框架及大型语言模型（LLMs）的发展历程。
AI.motivation: 法律解释的复杂性与AI技术的结合需求推动了研究，旨在实现法律知识的精准编码、论证结构的建模以及自动化解释建议的生成。
AI.method: 通过分析专家系统（知识工程）、论证框架（辩证交互建模）及机器学习（语言模型训练）三种方法，研究AI在法律解释中的不同实现路径。
AI.result: 专家系统确保规则一致性，论证框架提升解释合理性评估，语言模型推动自动化解释生成并逐步应用于法律实践。
AI.conclusion: AI技术通过多方法融合，为法律解释提供了从规则执行到论证分析的全面支持，未来需进一步结合LLMs提升实践效能。

title: Fusion-CAM: Integrating Gradient and Region-Based Class Activation Maps for Robust Visual Explanations
summary: Interpreting the decision-making process of deep convolutional neural networks remains a central challenge in achieving trustworthy and transparent artificial intelligence. Explainable AI (XAI) techniques, particularly Class Activation Map (CAM) methods, are widely adopted to visualize the input regions influencing model predictions. Gradient-based approaches (e.g. Grad-CAM) provide highly discriminative, fine-grained details by computing gradients of class activations but often yield noisy and incomplete maps that emphasize only the most salient regions rather than the complete objects. Region-based approaches (e.g. Score-CAM) aggregate information over larger areas, capturing broader object coverage at the cost of over-smoothing and reduced sensitivity to subtle features. We introduce Fusion-CAM, a novel framework that bridges this explanatory gap by unifying both paradigms through a dedicated fusion mechanism to produce robust and highly discriminative visual explanations. Our method first denoises gradient-based maps, yielding cleaner and more focused activations. It then combines the refined gradient map with region-based maps using contribution weights to enhance class coverage. Finally, we propose an adaptive similarity-based pixel-level fusion that evaluates the agreement between both paradigms and dynamically adjusts the fusion strength. This adaptive mechanism reinforces consistent activations while softly blending conflicting regions, resulting in richer, context-aware, and input-adaptive visual explanations. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks show that Fusion-CAM consistently outperforms existing CAM variants in both qualitative visualization and quantitative evaluation, providing a robust and flexible tool for interpreting deep neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fusion-CAM的新框架，通过结合基于梯度和基于区域的类激活图（CAM）方法，生成更稳健和具有判别力的视觉解释。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于梯度的CAM方法（如Grad-CAM）虽然能提供细粒度的判别信息，但容易产生噪声和不完整的激活图；而基于区域的CAM方法（如Score-CAM）则可能过度平滑，对细微特征敏感度降低。因此，需要一种方法来融合这两种范式，以获得更全面和准确的视觉解释。
AI.method: Fusion-CAM通过三个步骤实现融合：首先对基于梯度的激活图进行去噪，其次利用贡献权重结合梯度图与区域图以增强类别覆盖，最后采用自适应相似度像素级融合机制，动态调整融合强度，以强化一致激活并柔和融合冲突区域。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，Fusion-CAM在定性和定量评估方面均优于现有CAM变体，提供了更丰富、上下文感知和输入自适应的视觉解释。
AI.conclusion: Fusion-CAM通过统一基于梯度和基于区域的CAM方法，成功弥补了现有方法在解释深度神经网络决策过程中的不足，为可解释人工智能提供了一种稳健且灵活的工具。

title: Accelerating Sampling-Based Control via Learned Linear Koopman Dynamics
summary: This paper presents an efficient model predictive path integral (MPPI) control framework for systems with complex nonlinear dynamics. To improve the computational efficiency of classic MPPI while preserving control performance, we replace the nonlinear dynamics used for trajectory propagation with a learned linear deep Koopman operator (DKO) model, enabling faster rollout and more efficient trajectory sampling. The DKO dynamics are learned directly from interaction data, eliminating the need for analytical system models. The resulting controller, termed MPPI-DK, is evaluated in simulation on pendulum balancing and surface vehicle navigation tasks, and validated on hardware through reference-tracking experiments on a quadruped robot. Experimental results demonstrate that MPPI-DK achieves control performance close to MPPI with true dynamics while substantially reducing computational cost, enabling efficient real-time control on robotic platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的线性Koopman动力学模型的高效模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制框架，用于复杂非线性系统的实时控制。
AI.motivation: 传统MPPI控制算法计算成本高，难以满足实时控制需求，且依赖精确的系统模型。本文旨在通过数据驱动的方法降低计算开销并提升控制效率。
AI.method: 采用深度Koopman算子（DKO）模型从交互数据中学习线性动力学，替代传统MPPI中的非线性动力学模型，实现快速轨迹展开与高效采样。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验表明，MPPI-DK控制器在保持控制性能接近真实动力学MPPI的同时，显著降低了计算成本，实现了机器人平台的实时控制。
AI.conclusion: 基于学习的线性Koopman动力学模型能有效降低采样型控制的计算负担，为复杂系统的实时控制提供了可行方案。

title: ORMOT: A Dataset and Framework for Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision, aiming to track targets across video frames. Existing MOT methods perform well in general visual scenes, but face significant challenges and limitations when extended to visual-language settings. To bridge this gap, the task of Referring Multi-Object Tracking (RMOT) has recently been proposed, which aims to track objects that correspond to language descriptions. However, current RMOT methods are primarily developed on datasets captured by conventional cameras, which suffer from limited field of view. This constraint often causes targets to move out of the frame, leading to fragmented tracking and loss of contextual information. In this work, we propose a novel task, called Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking (ORMOT), which extends RMOT to omnidirectional imagery, aiming to overcome the field-of-view (FoV) limitation of conventional datasets and improve the model's ability to understand long-horizon language descriptions. To advance the ORMOT task, we construct ORSet, an Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking dataset, which contains 27 diverse omnidirectional scenes, 848 language descriptions, and 3,401 annotated objects, providing rich visual, temporal, and language information. Furthermore, we propose ORTrack, a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM)-driven framework tailored for Omnidirectional Referring Multi-Object Tracking. Extensive experiments on the ORSet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our ORTrack framework. The dataset and code will be open-sourced at https://github.com/chen-si-jia/ORMOT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ORMOT任务及框架，通过构建全向视觉数据集ORSet和基于大语言模型的ORTrack框架，解决传统多目标跟踪在视觉-语言场景下的视野限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标跟踪方法在视觉-语言场景中存在视野局限性，导致目标丢失和上下文信息缺失，而现有参照多目标跟踪数据集均基于传统相机拍摄，无法满足全向视觉需求。
AI.method: 构建包含27个全向场景、848条语言描述的ORSet数据集，并设计基于大视觉-语言模型（LVLM）的ORTrack框架，通过融合全向视觉信息与长时语言描述实现目标跟踪。
AI.result: 在ORSet数据集上的实验验证了ORTrack框架的有效性，证明其能有效克服传统数据集的视野限制并提升长时语言描述理解能力。
AI.conclusion: ORMOT任务和ORTrack框架为参照多目标跟踪提供了新的全向视觉解决方案，通过开放数据集和代码推动该领域研究进展。
